title: 'Pushpa' Paraded In Half-Pant: Video Of Arrested TMC Leader Jahangir Khan's Public Humiliation In Falta Goes Viral
description: Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader Jahangir Khan faced public humiliation as he was paraded on a road in Falta's Sahararhat by police in his half-pant following his arrest on charges of extortion.
